chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1404 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on CMA No.5479/2023 (C/A) 08.11.2023 Mr. Humail Rafi Mahesar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Shahid Hussain Gopang, Advocate has filed power on behalf of Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee, Pir-Jo-Goth, Taluka Kingri, who is also present in person and submits that almost only Rs.6,00,000/- on account of pensionary benefits are outstanding, which he undertakes to pay to the petitioner in two equal monthly installments. The petitioner’s Counsel and petitioner are satisfied. Accordingly, this application, in view of above, is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
